name: daily-trading-thesis-agent
description: Local daily trading thesis report generator using mock data.

scripts.daily-check: node src/main.js && node scripts/verify-report.js && node scripts/screenshot-report.js
scripts.daily-check:win: node src/main.js && node scripts/verify-report.js && node scripts/screenshot-report.js
scripts.daily-publish: npm.cmd run daily-check:win && npm.cmd run prepare-pages
